description_long: This is a dark green glass wine bottle with a cylindrical body and a gently sloping shoulder leading to a long, narrow neck. The bottle is sealed with a deep red capsule or foil that covers the closure at the top. A rectangular, light-colored label is affixed to the front, occupying a central position on the body and leaving the rest of the bottle unadorned. The glass surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The bottle's proportions and design are typical of red wine bottles, with a sturdy base and a classic silhouette. No visible branding or text is discernible on the label from these views.
description: A dark green glass wine bottle with a red capsule and a central rectangular label, featuring a smooth, glossy surface and classic wine bottle proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular label and red capsule clearly.
description_view_1: Angled side view with the label partially visible and the bottle's curvature more pronounced.
description_view_2: Rear view with no label visible, showing the uninterrupted dark green glass surface.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, label edge just visible, highlighting the bottle's symmetry.
attribute_label_or_branding: A single rectangular label is present on the front of the bottle, light gray or white in color, with no visible text, logos, or branding elements discernible from the images.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, and straight neck with a gentle taper from the shoulder to the closure.
